title: The Dietary Benefits of Drinking Milk

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Aw, you've got paperwork to do after this? You
sure you're not overworking yourself?

text_block_list.name: Store Manager
text_block_list.text:
There's no way I can dig myself out of this... I'm
sunk! How could I have messed up this badly?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Uh-oh. You might be fine, but there's someone
here who sure isn't.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Aaah, so you made a typo on the order form,
huh? Yeah, selling a thousand cartons of milk in a
day's gonna be rough...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But what if you actually manage to do it? That's a
lot of money right there! This little mistake might
lead to some mad profits!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Besides, I'm here to help, so no worries! You
always give me freebies when I shop here, so this
is my chance to pay you back! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Ryan! Perfect timing! How about some milk?
Didn't you say the carton you were using for your
protein powder ran out?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Wow, you remembered that? You're incredible,
Palmer... I was just thinking I had to grab another
carton or two!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I can buy in bulk, right? In that case, I'll take ten
cartons, please!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
I want some milk too! I gotta fuel up so I can keep
zooming!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Careful not to drink too much, or else you'll get a
stomachache! The daily recommended amount is
about a cup of milk a day.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Milk is full of protein, calcium, and a bunch of
other nutrients! You can't ask for a better
everyday drink!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Wow, that's amazing! Milk sure makes keeping
healthy a breeze!

text_block_list.name: Customer A
text_block_list.text:
Goodness, drinking milk has so many great
benefits! I should get some for my little one.
Excuse me, I'd like three cartons, please!

text_block_list.name: Customers
text_block_list.text:
Three for me, too!
I'll take five, please!
choice_data_list: (Uh-oh! We'll have to restock again soon!)
(Uh-oh! We'll have to restock again soon!)

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Palmer! We all came to help out! We'd each like
three cartons, please!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Wait, you came just for me?! That's so sweet of
you all! All right, how many of you are there?
One, two, three, four...

text_block_list.name: Store Manager
text_block_list.text:
Can you make a run to get more from the back,
Trainer? We've got to keep the shelves stocked!
choice_data_list: On it! I'll be right back!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Milk cartons fly off the shelves almost as fast as
we can restock them thanks to Mejiro Palmer's
help, but then...

text_block_list.name: Store Manager
text_block_list.text:
Oh no, it's starting to rain! Hey! Let's get all the
displays outside under the awning!

text_block_list.name: Store Manager
text_block_list.text:
Achoo! Ugh... The temperature dropped so
suddenly... I really can't catch a break...
choice_data_list: This won't be good for sales...

text_block_list.name: Store Manager
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for everything, you two. You really helped
me out of a jam.

text_block_list.name: Store Manager
text_block_list.text:
I'd hate to see the rest of the milk go to waste,
but I'll have no choice but to dispose of it all...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Oof, talk about crummy weather...
choice_data_list:
I don't think we'll be able to make any more
sales in these conditions...

I don't think we'll be able to make any more
sales in these conditions...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, things sure look bad, but! This is might be
our big break!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yep! And we can't let it slip us by!
Hey, is it okay if I borrow a few things? I'll need a
big pot, some sugar...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hey, there! Can I interest you in some hot milk? A
sip of this will warm you right up!

text_block_list.name: Shopper A
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, a warm drink on a cold day like this? I'll
take a cup, please!

text_block_list.name: Shopper B
text_block_list.text:
The rain came out of nowhere, but you guys sure
are prepared! That's some business acumen right
there!
choice_data_list: (Talk about turning a situation on its head!)
(Talk about turning a situation on its head!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much! That's the last of it! Which
means...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: We sold out! Waheeey!

text_block_list.name: Store Manager
text_block_list.text:
You seriously saved me and my business! How
could I possibly thank you?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry about it! The milk got sold, I got to
help you out, and everyone's happy! That's good
enough for me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry about it! The milk got sold, I got to
help you out, and everyone's happy! That's good
enough for me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
You're the bestest ever, Trainer! It was a blast
working alongside you!

text_block_list.name: Store Manager
text_block_list.text:
I really appreciate your aid as well. Thanks for
agreeing to help, despite your busy work
schedule.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Pfft! Lay it on as thick as you'd like, Trainer! You
won't get anything out of me other than a smile,
though!

text_block_list.name: Store Manager
text_block_list.text:
I really appreciate your aid as well. Thanks for
agreeing to help, despite your busy work
schedule.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Work... Work? Aaah!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Omigosh, you had paperwork left to do, didn't
you?! I totes forgot because I was so preoccupied
with our milk dilemma!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I'm so sorry!
choice_data_list: It's okay. I can do paperwork anytime.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Ah... I mean... Knowing you, I'm sure you really
mean that, but still...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I'm seriously sorry! This won't happen again!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer looks wilted and deflated from
guilt, a huge difference from her usual energetic
and chipper self.
